markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX's AI-driven content services for Fable Security.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Fable's Content Philosophy:** Prioritizes deep expertise over volume, targeting a skeptical cybersecurity audience (GRC, technical security, end-users) with content that is technically sound and drives impact.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Proposed Solution:** A "human-in-the-loop" AI platform that uses detailed "artifacts" (personas, guidelines) to generate high-quality content at scale (5 articles/week), with human editors ensuring accuracy and brand voice.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [**Fable's Partnership Model:** Prefers a "wedding cake" model—using GrowthX for supplemental content "feathered out" from Fable-led pillar pieces—over GrowthX creating all content from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [**Critical Due Diligence:** Fable requires GrowthX's data privacy policy (for proprietary info) and profiles of its cybersecurity-specific technical writers to vet expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)

## Topics

### Fable's Content Strategy & Challenges

  - [**Core Principle:** Quality over quantity. The goal is one high-quality, evergreen blog post per week to build authority, not to meet a volume metric.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [**Audience Segments:** Content must serve multiple, often skeptical, audiences:](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
      - [**GRC:** Needs clear, non-technical explanations of utility.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
      - [**Technical Security:** Requires deep expertise to be credible.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
      - [**End-Users:** Needs practical, actionable information.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
      - [**Investors/Budget Holders:** Requires content that justifies investment.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [**Content Pillars:**](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
      - [**Evergreen SEO:** Foundational content with a long shelf life.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
      - [**Emerging Threats:** Rapid-response analysis of trending human-based risk stories.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [**Sales Enablement:** Content to equip TAMs and pre-sales teams.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [**Anchor Content Models:**](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
      - [**"Wedding Cake":** Fable creates a pillar piece → GrowthX creates supplemental content. (Preferred)](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
      - [**"Cupcake Cake":** Many small pieces are combined to form a larger guide.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [**Gen.AI & Search:** Fable's initial audit shows poor performance in Gen.AI search results. A key goal is to understand and improve this.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Driven Content Platform

  - [**Methodology:** A "human-in-the-loop" AI platform to scale content creation without sacrificing quality.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
    1.  [**Artifact Creation:** Detailed documents (personas, guidelines, product info) are created to provide context for the AI. These are V1-generated and then refined iteratively with client feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
    2.  [**AI Workflows:** Agentic pipelines use these artifacts to perform research, draft articles, and validate accuracy against sources.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
    3.  [**Human Editing:** Editors review every article, making significant changes and using the platform to issue commands (e.g., "add points for a technical entrepreneur").](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [**Proof of Concept:**](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)
      - [**Biologica:** A highly regulated client in women's health. GrowthX created all content, which required doctor approval and compliance review. This demonstrates the platform's ability to handle complex, high-stakes content.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
      - [Send Fable GrowthX's data privacy policy.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
      - [Provide profiles of GrowthX's cybersecurity-specific technical writers.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [Share resources on optimizing content for Gen.AI search performance.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
      - [Add Stryker to the Fable/GrowthX Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1973.0)
  - [**Curtis & Stryker:**](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
      - [Discuss internally and follow up with Tyler on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/NHLBKZtmP5CxPBmJsicLQLMSy5KUBtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
